title: RandomAhhPack
description: A random ahh modpack with no specific niche
body:
<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>
This pack was initially made for a private Server. It was just published for ease of access.
If you somehow managed to stumble upon this and like what you see, feel free to use share/redistributite it how you want.
Survival mode is still experimental - expect bugs, conflicting repices or incompatibilities.
</details>

## What the hell is this?

It's a chaotic and totally unbalanced modpack with no niche. Just pure fun and madness:

* **Optimization**: A descendant of Fabulously Optimized, this pack runs smoother than your internet at 3 AM.

* **Beauty**: Tons of client-side mods from [Fabulous!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/Fabulous!) make the game visually stunning, with better lighting, effects, and ambience.

* **Creativity**: Create and a truckload of addons
let you build insane contraptions, along with Applied Energetics, ComputerCraft and 4+
storage mods because why not

* **Building**: MrCrayFish's Furniture, Create: Deco let you build cool structures or cozy houses, and WorldEdit helps you do that in no time

* **Fighting**: TACZ, Simply Swords, Create: Big Cannons... because what’s the point of building colonies if you can’t go to war?

* **Random bs**: Create: Broken Bad and other fun mods to play with friends.

* **And More**:  Cars, planes, food, plushies and other random nonsense just to keep things interesting.

This pack just revolves around having fun - bonus points if with friends. There is no theme for it; just a bit of everything, so everyone can enjoy.
